mapper.sql: TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.SITE_TYPE , AA.MEMB_SEQ , AA.LOG_TYPE , AA.ROUTER_NM , AA.ACCESS_IP , AA.PROC_STATUS , AA.API_URI , AA.API_PARAMS , AA.API_RES
mapper.select:
/* mapper.log.com.erns.coching.ApiLogDAO.getList */
SELECT
,MB.MEMB_ID ,MB.MEMB_NAME FROM T_API_LOG_H AA LEFT JOIN T_MEMB_INF MB ON AA.memb_seq = MB.memb_seq
AND MB.MEMB_ID LIKE '%' || #{membIdL, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND MB.MEMB_NAME LIKE '%' || #{membNameL, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND ( MB.MEMB_ID LIKE '%' || #{userSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR MB.MEMB_NAME LIKE '%' || #{userSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' )
ORDER BY AA.RGT_DTTM DESC
OFFSET #{offset} LIMIT #{rowSize}

/* mapper.log.com.erns.coching.ApiLogDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_API_LOG_H AA LEFT JOIN T_MEMB_INF MB ON AA.memb_seq = MB.memb_seq
AND MB.MEMB_ID LIKE '%' || #{membIdL, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND MB.MEMB_NAME LIKE '%' || #{membNameL, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND ( MB.MEMB_ID LIKE '%' || #{userSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR MB.MEMB_NAME LIKE '%' || #{userSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' )
